final:
module RefModule (
        input u,
        input v,
        input w,
        output x);

  wire temp1_(~u & v & ~w) |
           (~u & ~v & w) |
           (u & ~v & ~w) = (~u & v & ~w) |
           (~u & ~v & w) |
           (u & ~v & ~w);
  wire temp2_(u & v & w) = (u & v & w);
  assign x = temp1_(~u & v & ~w) |
           (~u & ~v & w) |
           (u & ~v & ~w) | temp2_(u & v & w);

endmodule
